description: Compares Porsche, BMW, and Mercedes-Benz registered passenger cars by current count, valid average power, and leasing presence.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" AND KoeretoejArtNavn.keyword == "Personbil" | EVAL brand = KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejBetegnelseStruktur.KoeretoejMaerkeTypeNavn.keyword | WHERE brand == "PORSCHE" OR brand == "BMW" OR brand == "MERCEDES-BENZ" | EVAL power_kw = CASE(KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt >= 1 AND KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt <= 750, KoeretoejOplysningGrundStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStruktur.KoeretoejMotorStoersteEffekt, null) | STATS car_count = COUNT(*), cars_with_valid_power = COUNT(power_kw), avg_power_kw = AVG(power_kw), leased_cars = COUNT(*) WHERE LeasingGyldigFra IS NOT NULL BY brand | EVAL avg_power_hp = ROUND(avg_power_kw * 1.36, 0), leasing_pct = ROUND(leased_cars * 100.0 / car_count, 1) | SORT car_count DESC | LIMIT 10
